name: pantry
summary: A dense storeroom for food — shelves packed with dry goods, barrels of salt-meat, hanging hams, a quiet mustiness.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: compact — pantries are tight, every wall used

primary_palette.note: shelved pantry — walls floor-to-ceiling in jars and sacks
bulk storage — casks and hanging meat
spice pantry — valuable dry goods, kept locked
mixed pantry — shelves, barrels, and boxes crammed in

story_prompts: full pantry, recently stocked, everything labeled
looted pantry — broken jars, spilled grain, nothing edible left
rat-infested pantry where the food moves on its own
magical pantry whose stores never run out
rotted pantry, spoilage-mold climbing the walls
anti_patterns: don't leave walls empty — pantries use every inch of wall
don't oversize; a pantry of 10x10 feels like a warehouse
avoid decorative props; this is pure storage
